title: Beghost
description:
FOR YOUR ACTS OF HERESY...Alas! You have been thrown into the dungeon where the souls of all who are imprisoned become trapped... forever!

As you navigate the labyrinthian corridors, you meet a peculiar ghost girl named Bee, who promises to help you find the exit.

A CINEMATIC EXPERIENCEBEGHOST is a narrative-heavy 2D action-adventure game set in the bowels of a haunted dungeon. Uncover the dungeon's darkest secrets alongside your companion Bee as you navigate your way through enemies, traps, and more in a desperate attempt to escape!

You may not believe in ghosts... but do you believe in Bee?

Developer's Statement Against the Use of AI Generated ContentBEGHOST is 100% human made and contains no AI generated content or code.
description_short: BEGHOST is a narrative-heavy 2D action-adventure game set in the bowels of a haunted dungeon. Uncover the dungeon's darkest secrets with your ghost girl companion Bee, as you navigate your way through enemies, traps, and more, in a desperate attempt to escape!
